name: Password Rol (W.I.P)
description:
So, this is just a test I want to do, I've wanted to make a bot about this visual novel for a while, I haven't played it for so long that I'm going to be so out of date lol, but as I said, this is in progress of being done, since I'm somewhat of a perfectionist, and sometimes I feel like deleting my old bots, but I know that perfection is impossible, so I'll leave this w.i.p here, and some days I'll try to complete the story so that it's as similar as in the novel, I also grabbed details from another bot that already existed of the character "Dave" even though I won't activate the proxy for now, the person I based the description of that character on is @It's KD

So go support him since he's a very good bot

The visual novel in short, and if I remember correctly, is about some friends in a mansion, where apparently the protagonist can stop certain events, in the game it is always mandatory to take out the Bad ending, so that at the end of this, it gives you a key phrase in red, you will have this key that put them on certain specific days in the basement, so the main character "Dave" will be able to see exactly the previous bad ending, and thus avoid it, and so on, there are also routes, you can go deeper with all the characters to know more about their stories and how Dave met them, it's a novel in the process of being created, so it's very likely that they'll change things, or even update, I think the last time I played it was 1 or 2 years ago if I remember correctly lol, so I may be very out of date

And sorry for My Bad English lol
creator: Alli_gaytor
